title: Iringa Urban Water Supply and Sewerage Authority) (Water and Sewerage Charges) Orders, 2003
title_en: Iringa Urban Water Supply and Sewerage Authority) (Water and Sewerage Charges) Orders, 2003

provisions.content: This Order may be cited as Iringa Urban Water Supply and Sewerage Authority) (Water and Sewerage Charges) Order, 2003, and shall be deemed to have come into operation on 1 st day of July, 2002.

A notice is hereby given that the charges in respect of services supplied by the Iringa Urban Water Supply and Sewerage Authority specified in the Schedule to this Order shall and be payable at the rates specified opposite the type of the services to be provided. Schedule A – Water supply 1. Domestic use (a) Areas of Wilolesi, Gangilonga, Miyomboni, Bus Stand and Uhindini: i. Unmetered customers TShs. 7,500.00 ii. Metered customers: 0 -25 units TShs. 7,500.00 More than 25 units TShs. 300.00/m 3 (b) Mkimbizi area: i. Unmetered customers TShs. 5,000.00 ii. Metered customers: 0 - 17 units TShs. 5,000.00 more than 17 units TShs. 300.00/m 3 (c) Areas of Kitanzini, Mshindo, Kijiweni, Mjimwema, Frelimo A & B, Mlandege, Mwangata, Kihodombi, Isoka, Lugalo, Kichangani, Others are Ilala, Mwembetogwa, Mvinjeni, Mkwawa, Makanyagio, Don Bosco, Kihesa (Ngome, Semtema, Mafifi), Dodoma “Road”, TRM Ipogoro, Kibwabwa and Ndiuka: i. Unmetered customers TShs. 3,500.00 ii. Metered customers: 0 – 11 units TShs. 3,500.00 more than 11 units TShs. 300.00/m 3 2 Metered Rates for Institutional, Commercial and Industrial Use No. Category Present rates TSh/m3 New rates w.e.f. 1/7/2002 TShs./m 3 1. Institution 300.00 300.00 2. Commercial 314.00 314.00 3. Industrial 376.00 376.00 3. New connection fees i. Domestic TShs. 20,000.00 ii. Institutional TShs. 25,000.00 iii. Commercial TShs. 30,000.00 iv. Industrial TShs. 40,000.00 4. Reconnection fees i. Domestic TShs. 3,000.00 ii. Institution, Commercial and Industrial TShs. 7,000.00 5. Meter rental charges i. Domestic TShs. 500.00 ii. Institution, Commercial and Industrial TShs. 2,000.00 B. Sewerage 1. Waste water collection i. Domestic TShs. 1,000.00 per connection ii. Institution & Commercial 30% of respective water charges iii. Dumping of liquid waste at sludge ponds TShs. 1,000.00 per truck. 2. New water connection i. Domestic TShs. 16,000.00 ii. Institution TShs. 28,000.00 History of this document 14 March 2003 this version Published in Gazette of the United Republic of Tanzania 11 01 July 2002 Commenced Related documents More documents like this one [] [] [] [] ▲ To the top > Contact us Visit our Twitter/X profile Visit our Linked In profile Visit our YouTube channel About TanzLII TanzLII is operated by the Judiciary of Tanzania and the Office of the Attorney General, Chief Parliamentary Draftsman, and publishes the law of Tanzania for free online access for all.
